zh.Dedham, Colchester district, Essex, Engl: 英國英格蘭艾可迪德哈姆
zh.Dedham, Essex, England: 英國英格蘭艾可迪德哈姆
zh.Colchester, Essex, England: 英國英格蘭艾可可爾斯特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne Clere於1560年出生在英國艾可可爾斯特時，她的父親Nicholas Clere26歲，母親Sarah Anne Clinton26歲。她於1584年9月11日與Edmund Sherman在英國艾可迪德哈姆結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1610年8月13日在英國艾可迪德哈姆享年50歲。

zh-hans.Colchester, Essex, England: 英国英格兰艾可可爾斯特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anne Clere于1560年出生在英国艾可可爾斯特时，她的父亲Nicholas Clere26岁，母亲Sarah Anne Clinton26岁。她于1584年9月11日与Edmund Sherman在英国艾可迪德哈姆结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1610年8月13日在英国艾可迪德哈姆享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: Clere
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Clear
meanings: English (southeastern England, of Norman origin): from Clere, the French popular form of the personal name Clare 2, and possibly interchangeable with it or confused with it.

English (southeastern): probably a habitational name from clere, a component of several placenames in north Hampshire (Highclere, Burghclere, Kingsclere). This is probably from a Celtic stream name meaning ‘bright’ (cognate with Latin clarus ‘clear, bright’).
Americanized form (translation into English) of German   Klar   1.

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

variants.name: Anni
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When Anne Clere was born in 1560, in Colchester, Essex, England, her father, Nicholas Clere, was 26 and her mother, Sarah Anne Clinton, was 26. She married Edmund Sherman on 11 September 1584, in Dedham, Essex, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 13 August 1610, in Dedham, Essex, England, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anne Clere est née en 1560, à Colchester, Essex, Angleterre, son père, Nicholas Clere, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Sarah Anne Clinton, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Edmund Sherman le 11 septembre 1584, à Dedham, Essex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 13 août 1610, à Dedham, Essex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anne Clere 1560 in Colchester, Essex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Nicholas Clere 26 und ihre Mutter Sarah Anne Clinton 26. Sie hat am 11. September 1584 in Dedham, Essex, England Edmund Sherman geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 13. August 1610 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Dedham, Essex, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Clere è nata il nel 1560 nel Colchester, Essex, England, sua padre, Nicholas Clere, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Sarah Anne Clinton, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Edmund Sherman il 11 settembre 1584, nel Dedham, Essex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 13 agosto 1610, nel Dedham, Essex, England, all'età di 50 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Anne Clereが1560年にイギリスエセックスコルチェスターで生まれた時，父Nicholas Clereは26歳，母Sarah Anne Clintonは26歳であった。1584年9月11日にイギリスエセックスデドハムでEdmund Shermanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1610年8月13日にイギリスエセックスデドハムで50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Anne Clere(이)가 1560년 영국 에세스 코체스터에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Nicholas Clere(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sarah Anne Clinton(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1584년 9월 11일 영국 에세스 데드함에서 Edmund Sherman(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1610년 8월 13일 영국 에세스 데드함에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Clere nasceu em 1560, em Colchester, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Nicholas Clere, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Sarah Anne Clinton, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Edmund Sherman em 11 de setembro de 1584, em Dedham, Essex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 13 de agosto de 1610, em Dedham, Essex, Inglaterra, com 50 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne Clere родилась в 1560 г. в местности колчестир, эссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Nicholas Clere было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Sarah Anne Clinton, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Edmund Sherman 11 сентября 1584 г. в местности дедхам, эссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 13 августа 1610 г. в местности дедхам, эссекс, Англия в возрасте 50 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anne Clere nació en 1560, en Colchester, Essex, Inglaterra, su papá, Nicholas Clere, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Sarah Anne Clinton, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Edmund Sherman el 11 de septiembre de 1584, en Dedham, Essex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 13 de agosto de 1610, en Dedham, Essex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 50 años.
